title: PTE (培生學術英語考試）你問我答

replies.msg:
PTE學術英語考試（英語：Pearson Test of English Academic，簡稱PTE Academic），亦譯作培生學術英語考試。

考試特點
同托福雅思相似，培生學術英語考試從說寫、閱讀、聽力三個部分來測驗考生英語能力。每部分均包括不同的考察範圍，考察考生全面的綜合能力（integrated skills），從這個角度來說它和新托福（TOEFL iBT）更像。
考試長度為單一的3個小時。
考試在計算機平台上進行（computer-based）, 相對於雅思的傳統卷面答題，培生學術英語和新托福的網絡答題（internet-based）平台更為接近。
同傳統的人工閱卷不同，培生學術英語採用全自動的機械評分，考生可在五日內獲得成績。
考試有效期和托福雅思一樣，均為兩年；
培生學術英語考試結合下列幾項特點：
多種口音和學術用語在試題中出現，與現實情況貼近。
總分範圍從10到90，分為6個分數等級。



Copy wiki 開左個頭先
利申：廢jer

quote.msg: 聽講pte易過ielts係咪真?

replies.msg:
我只可以講話以PTE 係可以achieve 到比IELTS更高既分數
但整體上PTE唔一定比IELTS 容易
單從題型上睇PTE 應該係難d e.g. Speaking, listening

quote.msg: 我同普遍香港人一樣死listening同speaking，諗住pte會易d拎高分
PTE speaking 比IELTS 更難
其實我覺得本來pte優勢係電腦考，但當ielts都開始改做電腦考既時候，好似ielts會比較好？

replies.msg:
altho ielts also provides computer based test, the marking is different from pte

you can check out the ielts 8 or above speaking samples online, it's surely hard for HKers to imitate, cuz it's basically the use of daily english, not so academic after all I would say, but it's very easy for a native user, just chitchat in a serious mode,

moreover, ielts involves human marking, which could greatly impact the results, scores are more likely affected by the intonation, smoothness and style of how you use english, these are all what HKers lack of. scores depend on how well you understand english and how deep you into it;

pte is computer marking, it compares your english with numbers of native users and rates how alike your english is. it's kinda machinery, you read or listen from the computer and repeat it real fast and clear, more like a phone robot the better, the drill is just catching the words, in that way you will easily get 65 or above even your sentence structure is like shit, all tenses are wrong, it ain't matter, cuz these only affect the enabling skills, not communicative skills, but this is also the reason many natives think this test is invalid and hilarious, just no one actually speak or use english that way.

I won't say ppl getting high scores in pte have a better understanding of english, but they are more adaptive of nowadays and future computerised english environments.

but ppl have high scores in ielts, yes, they basically know better english, as simple as that.
